• Implements a 2‑D mining game with procedural world, player stats, inventory, and admin host‑election.
  • Provides UI layers for chat, settings, shop, dashboard, warp, and custom modals using a lightweight modal system.
  • Features a sound manager (engine, mining, explosions, UI tones) and a texture engine for custom tile skins.
    const Game = new GameEngine();
    const Sound = new SoundManager();

This HTML/JS code sets up a canvas‑based mining game with mobile controls, custom textures, a shop system, and networking for multiplayer rooms. It includes performance optimizations (tile batching, star field caching) and a modular UI for settings, inventory, and admin functions. The game tracks player upgrades, saves progress locally, and can sync via cloud storage.
